en: Send a text to +14165550101 saying "I'm on my way.".

zh: 请给+14165550102发短信说“有空时给我回个电话”。
en: Please SMS +14165550102 with "Please call me when you're free.".

zh: 给+14165550104发条消息，说“我现在在外面了”。
en: Send +14165550104 a message that says "I'm outside now.".

zh: 你能给+14165550105发条短信说“你能把地址发给我吗？”？
en: Can you send an SMS to +14165550105 saying "Can you send me the address?"?

zh: 给+14165550106发条短信，说“会议改到下午3点了。”
en: Send a text to +14165550106 saying "Meeting moved to 3 PM.".

zh: 请给+14165550107发短信，说“别忘了带文件”。
en: Please SMS +14165550107 with "Don't forget the documents.".

zh: 给+14165550109发条消息，说“我打完电话再给你发消息”。
en: Send +14165550109 a message that says "I'll text you after the call.".

zh: 你能不能给+14165550110发条短信，内容写“谢谢更新！”？
en: Can you send an SMS to +14165550110 saying "Thanks for the update!"?
